word: H7493 - רָעַשׁ - râʻash - raw-ash - Make afraid

sections.paragraph:
Original: רעשׁ

Transliteration: râ‛ash

Phonetic: raw-ash

BDB Definition:

  1. to quake, shake
    1. (Qal) to quake, shake
    2. (Niphal) to be made to quake
    3. (Hiphil)
      1. to cause to quake
      2. to cause to spring or leap (of horse)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2195

Part(s) of speech: Verb
